critical.mandate: Append validation results to the story file

step.title: Load Story
step.ask: Which story to validate? (provide story key)

step.title: Completeness
step.action: Verify all sections present: AC, technical notes, subtasks, DoD

step.title: Clarity
step.action: Check each AC is testable and unambiguous

step.title: Dependencies
step.action: Verify all declared dependencies exist and are resolvable

step.title: Generate Validation Report
step.action: Append validation result (PASS/FAIL with findings) to story file
step.template-output: Append validation results (PASS/FAIL with detailed findings) to the story file.
